Treatment Arm 1 Regimen.value: Abiraterone acetate 1000 mg daily + prednisolone 5 mg daily, in addition to lifelong androgen deprivation therapy (ADT), continued until disease progression.

Treatment Arm(s).value: Standard-of-care plus daily abiraterone acetate 1000 mg and prednisolone 5 mg

Trial Name.value: Abiraterone acetate plus prednisolone for metastatic patients starting hormone therapy: 5-year follow-up results from the STAMPEDE randomised trial

Class of Agent in Treatment Arm 1.group_name: Class of Agent in Treatment Arm 1

Secondary Endpoint(s).value: failure-free survival, progression-free survival, metastatic progression-free survival, skeletal-related events, disease-specific survival, toxicity and therapy for progression

Add-on Treatment.value: Abiraterone acetate 1000 mg plus prednisolone 5 mg

Type of Therapy.value: Standard-of-care (SOC) alone or SOC plus abiraterone acetate (AAP)

PFS Rate (%) | Overall | Treatment.value: Hazard Ratio (vs SOC-alone): 0.58 (95% CI: 0.49-0.69, P <.0001). Progression-free survival rate at 5 years: 54% (95% CI: 50-59). Events: 241. Restricted Mean Survival Time (RMST): 62 months (95% CI: 59-66).

PFS Rate (%) | Overall | Control.value: Progression-free survival rate at 5 years: 37% (95% CI: 33-42). Hazard Ratio: Reference. Events: 323. Restricted Mean Survival Time (RMST): 47 months (95% CI: 43-51).
